steps.title: Use the product formula
steps.content:
For a quadratic $ax^2+bx+c=0$, the product of the solutions is $\frac{c}{a}$. In the given equation,
$$a=38$$
and
$$c=rs$$

steps.title: Match the given product form
steps.content:
The product of the solutions is
$$\frac{rs}{38}$$
The problem says this equals $krs$, so
$$krs=\frac{rs}{38}$$
Divide by $rs$. The answer is 1/38.
